SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-19-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ASHLEY MULLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIMEE ARMATA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LANI CHOW IS PRESENT. PROOFS OF SERVICES ON FILE. ALL PARTIES ARE AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. IF THERE ARE DOCUMENTS, PICTURES, OR OTHER EVIDENCE A PARTY WISHES TO RELY ON AT THE HEARING SHE MUST SEND IT TO THE COURT AND THE OTHER PARTY AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULLIN, ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMATA, AIMEE CHOW, LANI $510.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $660.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF ASHLEY MULLIN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIMEE ARMATA IS PRESENT.
